reviews.review_description:
This is a great app. Is it only a demo? It looks like most levels are inaccessible.

Also, on the 3rd level, after about two minutes, my headset started alternating between gameplay and a black screen in one second intervals. It did that for the rest of the level. Naturally, I eventually died. I've never seen that sort of bug in any other Quest game. Unfortunately, it was pretty game-breaking.

Otherwise, this shows a ton of promise!

UPDATE: I'd love to give more detailed feedback...is there a discord available? I couldn't find a link for one online.

developer_response.body:
Hi Quackbirth,
Thanks for the feedback. Just to clarify — the black screen effect in Level 3 is actually an intentional mechanic called the flicker sequence. It’s designed to test player focus under pressure, though we completely agree it needs better visual cues so it doesn’t come across as a bug.

Also yes — this is just a demo, with only a few levels unlocked and only a fraction of the unique mechanics and environments we’re building. Really appreciate the support and kind words. An update is on the way!

– Cosmic Drift VR Team

reviews.review_description:
Simple to pick up and quite addictive. It is designed to help improve your reaction times as well as be fun to play.
I like the novel movement technique of physically moving your arms but this mean they can get tired after a while!
The sounds are great and there are lots of levels to keep you interested. i did think they got quite difficult too quickly and that can be frustrating. Also it is not always easy to know where to fly so more way pointers would be good in any updates.

reviews.review_title: Cosmic VR Challenge with a Unique Twist
reviews.review_description:
This game offers a fresh and exciting cosmic-themed VR experience, with a unique mechanic where your controllers shift position to match a moving plane—making for an unexpectedly great shoulder workout! The gameplay feels smooth and engaging, and the two available modes add variety to keep things interesting.

The presentation is top-notch, with polished graphics that really immerse you in the experience. With a full release potentially coming in November 2025, now is the perfect time to jump in and give it a try. Definitely one to watch! 🚀✨🎮

I wasn’t sure what to expect. But in the short time I’ve played this I’ve really enjoyed it! The control mechanics of the ship with your hands, the flying and collection are so much fun. If my Quest battery hadn’t died I’d still be playing now. Will definitely be hopping back into this one. Nice start, devs!
I saw the game through tiktok i have played quite a bit now and honestly i love it
